system_overview.name: Tares - Swiss Customs Tariff System
system_overview.official_provider: Federal Office for Customs and Border Security (BAZG/AZAD)
system_overview.description: Free online system for accessing Swiss customs tariffs
system_overview.availability: Free of charge for all users

tariff_code_specifications.nomenclature: Swiss Customs Tariff (based on HS nomenclature)

supplementary_resources.explanatory_notes: Detailed descriptions of which goods correspond to which codes

bulk_download_capability.notes: Tares system appears to be interface-based lookup only
potential_workarounds: Contact BAZG directly for bulk tariff data
Web scraping may be possible but terms of use unclear

recent_updates.affected_areas: Tariff rates and classifications updated annually

data_specifications.geographical_scope: Swiss customs tariffs - applies to Switzerland and bilateral/multilateral agreements
data_specifications.product_scope: All goods subject to Swiss import duties
data_specifications.historical_data: Previous tariff schedules may be available

assessment.importance: MEDIUM-HIGH - Switzerland is a major trading nation with specific tariff structure
assessment.accessibility: Public interface available but no bulk download documented
assessment.recommendation: Contact BAZG (bazg@bazg.admin.ch or through website) for bulk tariff data extraction
